sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3973" key="a)lektori/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλεκτορ-ίσκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλέκτωρ</foreign>, <sense id="n3973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cockerel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:5:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:341:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">341.12</biblScope> </bibl>: as ornament, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. χαλκοῦς</foreign> Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cultes Egyptiens</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Delos</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
